name: Chile Relleno Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse chiles, open flat and remove seeds. Drain on paper towels.
2. Brown meat with onion and garlic. Drain.
3. Add 1 teaspoon Cumin, 1.5 tablespoons Chile Powder, and Salt to the meat mixture. Stir.
4. In a greased 9x13 inch pan, layer chiles, beef, and additional chiles.
5. Combine cheeses and sprinkle over chiles.
6. Beat together eggs, evaporated milk, and flour. Pour over cheese mixture.
7. Add 2 teaspoons Cumin and 1.5 tablespoons Chile Powder to the tomato sauce. Pour over all.
8. Bake for 30-45 minutes at 350°F. (Note: If preparing ahead of time, do not cover with tomato sauce until baking.)
9. Serve toppings in separate bowls and let guests help themselves.
